ores.description: Raw materials for smithing and crafting

copper_ore.description: A common copper ore used for bronze bars.

tin_ore.description: A common tin ore used for bronze bars.

iron_ore.description: An iron ore used for iron and steel bars.

coal.description: Essential fuel for smelting higher-tier bars.

mithril_ore.description: A rare blue ore used for mithril bars.

adamantite_ore.description: A valuable green ore used for adamantite bars.

runite_ore.description: The rarest ore, used for runite bars.

log.description: Basic logs from normal trees. Used for fletching.

oak_log.description: Sturdy oak logs. Used for fletching.

willow_log.description: Flexible willow logs. Used for fletching.

maple_log.description: Strong maple logs. Used for fletching.

yew_log.description: High-quality yew logs. Used for fletching.

magic_log.description: Rare magical logs. Used for fletching.

redwood_log.description: Ancient redwood logs. Used for fletching.

seeds.description: Seeds for growing crops on your farm

potato_seed.description: Plant these to grow potatoes. Growth time: 8 hours. Requires farming level 1.

onion_seed.description: Plant these to grow onions. Growth time: 8 hours. Requires farming level 5.

cabbage_seed.description: Plant these to grow cabbage. Growth time: 8 hours. Requires farming level 10.

carrot_seed.description: Plant these to grow carrots. Growth time: 16 hours. Requires farming level 15.

tomato_seed.description: Plant these to grow tomatoes. Growth time: 16 hours. Requires farming level 20.

corn_seed.description: Plant these to grow corn. Growth time: 16 hours. Requires farming level 25.

pumpkin_seed.description: Plant these to grow pumpkins. Growth time: 24 hours. Requires farming level 30.

watermelon_seed.description: Plant these to grow watermelons. Growth time: 24 hours. Requires farming level 35.

strawberry_seed.description: Plant these to grow strawberries. Growth time: 48 hours. Requires farming level 40.

magic_herb_seed.description: Plant these to grow magic herbs. Growth time: 48 hours. Requires farming level 50.

dragon_fruit_seed.description: Plant these to grow dragon fruit. Growth time: 60 hours. Requires farming level 55.

golden_wheat_seed.description: Plant these to grow golden wheat. Growth time: 72 hours. Requires farming level 65.

spirit_seed.description: Plant these to grow spirit herbs. Growth time: 80 hours. Requires farming level 75.

celestial_bloom_seed.description: Plant these to grow celestial blooms. Growth time: 96 hours. Requires farming level 85.

starfruit_seed.description: Plant these to grow starfruit. Growth time: 108 hours. Requires farming level 95.

void_lotus_seed.description: Plant these to grow void lotus. Growth time: 120 hours. Requires farming level 99.
